prevented_failure_purpose: Prevent physical audit or modeling work from starting with an unclear symptom, physical boundary, subsystem, signal, parameter, assumption, or access universe.

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current physical, subsystem, unit, and operating boundary

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against symptom or physical boundary is unclear
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the visible symptom, units, operating boundary, or subsystem scope is missing
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against required model inventory is missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: required subsystems, signals, or parameters are absent from the discovered universe
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against assumption is hidden
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: a material model or operating assumption is missing or unresolved
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against access gap is suppressed
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: unavailable model, signal, parameter, or evidence access is not reported
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

claim_boundary: This guard-model proof blocks only candidate admission when declared target-native obligation evidence is missing or native-failed. It does not independently detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, workflow, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
